deftness.ex: She played the_violin with amazing deftness.

defunct.def: 失效的、死掉的、不再存在的的人的人物 (單數) (效)
defunct.ex: The_firm became defunct last local year.

defuse.def: 拆除引信、緩和緊張局勢的人的人
defuse.ex: He tried to defuse the_growing tension.

defy.def: 公然反抗、蔑視、向...挑戰的人的人人物 (單數) (反)

degeneracy.ex: He was shocked by the_moral degeneracy.

degenerate.def: 衰退、墮落的人物、退化的人的人人物 (單數) (墮/退)
degenerate.ex: The_talks began to degenerate into fight.

degenerative.def: 退化的、墮落的人的人物 (單數) (退)
degenerative.ex: He suffers from a degenerative disease.

degradation.def: 降級、墮落、退化人物 (單數) (降)

degradable.def: 可降解的、可降級的人的人物 (單數) (解)

degrade.def: 降級、墮落、退化的人的人
degrade.ex: Don't degrade yourself by lying now.

degraded.def: 被降級的、墮落的人的人 (或物) (墮)
degraded.ex: They lived in a very degraded area.

degrading.def: 丟臉的、可恥的人 (或物) (恥)
degrading.ex: It was such a very degrading treatment.

degree.def: 程度、度數、學位、等級人物 (單數) (程)
degree.col: to a degree, by degrees (逐漸), master's degree
degree.ex: He is improving only by small degrees.

dehisce.ex: The_seed pod will dehisce in autumn.

dehiscent.def: 會自動裂開的人的人物 (裂)
dehiscent.ex: The_pea is a common dehiscent fruit.

dehorn.ex: The_farmer had to dehorn his cattle.

dehumanize/dehumanise.def: 使失人性、使機械化的人的人

dehumidifier.def: 抽濕機、除濕器人物 (單數) (器)
dehumidifier.ex: I bought a new electric dehumidifier.

dehydrate.ex: High heat will help to dehydrate you.

dehydrogenate.ex: The_lab tried to dehydrogenate it now.

deice.ex: They need to deice the_plane wings.

deicer.def: 除冰裝置、除冰劑人物 (單數) (劑)
deicer.ex: He used a spray deicer on the_window.

deictic.ex: Here is a common local deictic word.

deification.def: 神格化、崇拜人物 (單數) (神)

deify.def: 將...神化、把...奉為神的人的人
deify.ex: They began to deify their fallen heroes.

deign.ex: She didn't deign to answer my letter.

deism.ex: He is a man who follows modern deism.

deist.def: 自然神論者人物 (單數) (者)
deist.ex: The_convinced deist spoke to us today.

deity.def: 神、女神、上帝的人物 (單數) (神)
deity.ex: They prayed to the_supreme deity now.

deject.def: 使沮喪、使灰心的人的人
deject.ex: Bad news continue to deject his spirit.

dejected.def: 沮喪的、垂頭喪氣的人的人 (或物) (沮)
dejected.ex: He looked very dejected after the_loss.

dejectedly.ex: He walked dejectedly away from them.

dejection.def: 沮喪、憂鬱、糞便人物 (單數) (沮)
dejection.ex: A sense of deep dejection filled him.

delay.def: 延遲、耽擱、推遲的人的人人物 (單數) (延)
delay.col: without delay, flight delay, delay in
delay.ex: The_flight was delay by three hours.

delayed.def: 延遲的、誤點的人的人 (或物) (誤)
delayed.ex: The_train was much delayed by snow.

delectable.def: 令人愉快的、美味的、迷人的的人物 (單數) (美)
delectable.ex: We had a very delectable meal tonight.

delectation.def: 愉快、享受、喜悅人物 (單數) (愉)
delectation.ex: I made this cake for your delectation.
